title: Hide Arrows
description: A mod to hide arrows once they've hit players.
body:
A simple mod to hide arrows and bee stings in living entities.

Each type can be configured individually: hide them entirely, show all of them (vanilla behaviour), or cap how many are visible per entity at once. Settings are saved to `config/hide-arrows.json` and can also be adjusted through the in-game Mod Menu config screen.

![Configuration screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a4ae2729a66a572730be1e9c9135e2b15e26645_0.webp)
